LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT DEIRDRE STACK'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 12, 2013 TO GIVE THE PARTIES THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND 2.6C. MS. STACK MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AND CACH, LLC MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 9, 2013 AT 4:00 PM. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DEIRDRE STACK'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT BASED UPON CCP 430.10(E) IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF STATES A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND IDENTIFIES WHEN THE ASSIGNMENT OCCURRED. THE DEMURRER BASED ON CCP 430.10(G) IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT IS NOT PERMITTED TO FILE A SPECIAL DEMURRER IN THIS LIMITED CIVIL CASE. SEE CCP 92(C). IN ADDITION, A LIBERAL READING OF THE COMPLAINT INDICATES THAT THE PARTIES ENTERED INTO A WRITTEN CONTRACT AND PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES THE CONTRACT ACCORDING TO ITS LEGAL EFFECT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD A. KRAMER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN CSR6185.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2013 Continued To Oct-30-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DEIRDRE STACK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT based upon CCP 430.10(e) is overruled. Plaintiff states a cause of action for breach of contract and identifies when the assignment occurred. The demurrer based on CCP 430.10(g) is overruled. Defendant is not permitted to file a special demurrer in this limited civil case. See CCP 92(c). In addition, a liberal reading of the complaint indicates that the parties entered into a written contract and plaintiff sufficiently alleges the contract according to its legal effect. Order signed in open court. Judge: Richard A. Kramer, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Continued To Aug-12-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT DEIRDRE STACK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to August 12, 2013 to give the parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B and 2.6C. Ms. Stack must deliver courtesy copies of the First Amended Complaint and Cach, LLC must deliver courtesy copies of its opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 9, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers.
Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jeff Workman, Esq., Tel. 415.722.1157, specially appearing for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT DEIRDRE STACK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend to clarify when Plaintiff became the assignee of GE. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2013 Continued To Apr-29-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DEIRDRE STACK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued on the court's own motion to April 29, 2013 in order to permit Ms. Stack to comply with Local Rule 2.6C and the court's ruling on February 26, 2013. Ms. Stack must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 29, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the demurrer will be overruled. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Continued To Mar-29-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT DEIRDRE STACK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to March 29, 2013, to give all parties an opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. All parties shall provide courtesy copies of their papers by March 5, 2013. Please attach a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM
